name: Leslie Jue DDS
tagline: A legacy of trust in Sonoma County dentistry
seoDescription: SOCO Dental Studio in Santa Rosa, CA offers cosmetic, restorative, and preventive dentistry. Dr. Leslie Jue has cared for smiles since 1987.

hero.heading: Three generations of dentists, one Santa Rosa practice
hero.subheading: SOCO Dental Studio brings Dr. Leslie Jue's decades of cosmetic and family care together with Drs. Louie and Baird at 55 Mission Circle.

highlights: Dr. Leslie Jue caring for smiles since 1987
University of the Pacific, Dugoni School of Dentistry trained

about.heading: About SOCO Dental Studio
body: SOCO Dental Studio was formed when Dr. Michael Louie merged two long-established Santa Rosa practices into one home for multi-generational families across Sonoma County. The result is a team built on a legacy of trust, with three generations of dental experience under one roof.

Dr. Leslie Jue has delivered outstanding dental care since 1987. A UC Davis physiology graduate and University of the Pacific, Arthur A. Dugoni School of Dentistry alumna, she is a member of the American Academy of Cosmetic Dentistry and a longtime fixture of the local dental community.

services.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
services.description: Veneers, bonding, teeth whitening, and full smile makeovers tailored to each patient.

services.title: Invisalign
services.description: Clear, removable aligners that straighten teeth without traditional metal braces.

services.title: Restorative Care
services.description: Crowns, fillings, root canal therapy, and full-mouth rehabilitation to restore function.

services.title: Dental Implants
services.description: Permanent, natural-looking replacements for missing or failing teeth.

services.title: Preventive & Hygiene
services.description: Cleanings, exams, sealants, and periodontal care to keep smiles healthy long term.

services.title: Emergency Dentistry
services.description: Prompt care for dental pain, breaks, and other urgent situations.
